message:
fix: fresh-eyes review fixes for provider + SSE error paths

- OpenAI provider: add done=true on both error paths (process_event
  parse error and SSE transport error) for consistency with Anthropic
- SSE stream: after feeding valid UTF-8 prefix on invalid byte error,
  keep only offending bytes in utf8_buffer (drain processed prefix)
  to prevent potential event duplication on re-poll

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
